description: Bump @biomejs/biome from 2.4.5 to 2.4.6 in all 31 plugin package.json files, then run npm update in each plugin to resolve in-range patches for @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk and @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools (0.0.67→0.0.70).

userStories.title: Bump biome and update deps in all plugins
userStories.description: Update @biomejs/biome from exact version 2.4.5 to 2.4.6 in all 31 plugin package.json files under plugins/. Then run npm update in each plugin directory to resolve the in-range bumps for @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk and @opentabs-dev/plugin-tools (both from 0.0.67 installed to 0.0.70 latest, within existing ^0.0.70 ranges).
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build:plugins completes without errors
npm run check:plugins completes without errors
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/airbnb/package.json
- plugins/airtable/package.json
- plugins/asana/package.json
- plugins/bitbucket/package.json
- plugins/clickhouse/package.json
- plugins/cloudflare/package.json
- plugins/cockroachdb/package.json
- plugins/confluence/package.json
- plugins/craigslist/package.json
- plugins/discord/package.json
- plugins/dominos/package.json
- plugins/doordash/package.json
- plugins/e2e-test/package.json
- plugins/figma/package.json
- plugins/github/package.json
- plugins/gitlab/package.json
- plugins/jira/package.json
- plugins/linear/package.json
- plugins/linkedin/package.json
- plugins/notion/package.json
- plugins/panda-express/package.json
- plugins/reddit/package.json
- plugins/retool/package.json
- plugins/sentry/package.json
- plugins/slack/package.json
- plugins/stackoverflow/package.json
- plugins/supabase/package.json
- plugins/teams/package.json
- plugins/todoist/package.json
- plugins/vercel/package.json
- plugins/x/package.json

Context:
All 31 plugins are standalone packages (NOT in the root npm workspace). Each has its own node_modules and package-lock.json. Biome is pinned as an exact version (no ^ prefix) in each plugin's devDependencies. The SDK and tools already have ^0.0.70 ranges but the installed versions are 0.0.67 (stale lockfiles).

Changes:
For each of the 31 plugins:
1. In package.json, change `"@biomejs/biome": "2.4.5"` to `"@biomejs/biome": "2.4.6"` in devDependencies
2. Run `cd plugins/<name> && npm install && npm update` to update the lockfile and pick up in-range patches

A script approach is recommended — use a bash loop or the existing `tsx scripts/plugins.ts` infrastructure:
```bash
for dir in plugins/*/; do
  if [ -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then
    # Update biome version using sed or node
    node -e "
      const fs = require('fs');
      const path = '$dir/package.json';
      const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'));
      if (pkg.devDependencies?.['@biomejs/biome']) {
        pkg.devDependencies['@biomejs/biome'] = '2.4.6';
        fs.writeFileSync(path, JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2) + '\n');
      }
    "
    (cd "$dir" && npm install && npm update)
  fi
done
```

Constraints:
- Do NOT add a ^ prefix to biome — it's intentionally pinned exact.
- Do NOT change SDK or tools version ranges — they are already at ^0.0.70; only the installed versions need updating via npm update.
- Do NOT modify any source files (.ts) — only package.json and lockfiles change.
- After all updates, run `npm run build:plugins` from the repo root to verify all plugins build.
- Then run `npm run check:plugins` from the repo root to verify type-check, lint, and format.
